200.description: Canonical verify_release request JSON Schema. Minimal generic-buyer body: {"endpoint":"https://public-service.example/path"}.

402.description: x402 v2 challenge for OKX tooling probes

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Optional. When absent PreFlight derives replay-safe idempotency from the verified payment authorization and canonical request.

200.description: Settlement-confirmed judge-facing v2 report; `detail` retains the v1 private report shape.

402.description: x402 v2 challenge emitted before business-body validation

200.description: Authenticated OnchainOS CLI listing resolution with field provenance
Public cryptographic receipt verification. This verifies issuer authenticity and payload integrity, not target correctness.
Public cryptographic receipt verification for JSON clients. This verifies issuer authenticity and payload integrity, not target correctness.
Public free-discovery cohort aggregate; only conforming ASPs are named.
Active and retired receipt verification public keys
Private machine-readable report for agents and CI

VerifyReleaseRequestV1.title: PreFlight verify_release request
VerifyReleaseRequestV1.description: Canonical public input for PreFlight Release Gate. Generic buyers only need endpoint. schema_version is optional and defaults internally to preflight.verify-release-request.v1.

endpoint.description: Canonical target field. Must be a public HTTPS service endpoint, for example https://public-service.example/path.

agent_id.description: Optional alternative to endpoint: resolve an OKX.AI Agent ID and verify its A2MCP service.

manifest.description: Advanced operator-confirmed manifest request. Use endpoint for generic buyer integrations.

expected.description: Optional caller expectations compared against observed release behavior.

probe_input.description: Optional JSON payload used only for discovery/probe requests.

authorize_buyer_proof.description: Optional; defaults to false. When true, PreFlight may make a bounded outbound buyer-proof payment to the target.

owner_attestation.description: Required and must be true only when authorize_buyer_proof is true.

include_in_gallery.description: Optional; defaults to false. Opts BLOCK/UNKNOWN redacted results into the public gallery.
